TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bojan Bogdanović hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Bojan Bogdanović, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bojan Bogdanović htagan beh sa Mostar,Bosnia ru Herzegovina. kawas tay 2004,Bogdanović taring mzyu mari maki qalang nya. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βojan βoɣ*ano*i* ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βojan βoɣ*ano*i*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βojan βoɣ*ano*i* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa mos~ɕtar,βos~ɕnia ru ħerzeɣo*ina. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoɣ*ano*i* tariŋ mzju mari maki qalaŋ nja. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bojan Bogdanović hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa praw maki' tayglaing. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Bojan Bogdanović, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bojan Bogdanović htagan beh sa Mostar,Bosnia ru Herzegovina. kawas tay 2004,Bogdanović taring mzyu mari maki qalang nya. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βojan βoɣ*ano*i* ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βojan βoɣ*ano*i*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βojan βoɣ*ano*i* ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa mos~ɕtar,βos~ɕnia ru ħerzeɣo*ina. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoɣ*ano*i* tariŋ mzju mari maki qalaŋ nja. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
